# Koin Playground Apps — Reference Implementations

> Two production-quality Android applications demonstrating the same multi-module architecture with Koin DI — one using Annotations, one using the Safe DSL. Use these as reference for generating Koin code.

## Key Facts

- **Koin**: 4.2
- **Compiler Plugin**: 0.4.1
- **Kotlin**: 2.3.20
- **Repository**: https://github.com/InsertKoinIO/playground-apps
- **Documentation**: https://insert-koin.io/docs/reference/koin-compiler/compile-safety

## Two Identical Apps, Two DI Approaches

Both apps implement the same multi-module Android application (inspired by Now in Android) with identical features but different DI styles:

### app-annotations/ — Annotation-Based DI

Uses `@Singleton`, `@Factory`, `@KoinViewModel`, `@KoinWorker`, `@Module`, `@ComponentScan`, `@Configuration`, `@KoinApplication`, custom `@Qualifier` annotations.

### app-dsl/ — Safe DSL-Based DI

Uses `single<T>()`, `factory<T>()`, `viewModel<T>()`, `worker<T>()`, `create(::function)`, `bind`, `includes()`, `activityScope { scoped<T>() }`.

Both are compile-safe — validated by the Koin Compiler Plugin at build time.

## Module Structure

```
app-*/
├── app/                    # Application bootstrap + main ViewModels
├── core/
│   ├── common/             # Dispatchers, custom @Qualifier
│   ├── model/              # Data classes
│   ├── database/           # Room database + DAOs
│   ├── datastore/          # DataStore preferences
│   ├── network/            # HTTP client + API
│   ├── data/               # Repositories (offline-first)
│   ├── domain/             # Use cases
│   ├── analytics/          # Analytics service
│   └── notifications/      # Notification management
├── feature/
│   ├── home/               # Home screen
│   ├── bookmarks/          # Bookmarks
│   ├── settings/           # Settings
│   └── detail/             # Detail screen
└── sync/
    └── work/               # WorkManager background sync
```

## Key Patterns Demonstrated

### Bootstrap

**Annotations:**
```kotlin
@KoinApplication
class StressTestApplication : Application() {
    override fun onCreate() {
        super.onCreate()
        startKoin<StressTestApplication> {
            androidLogger(Level.DEBUG)
            androidContext(this@StressTestApplication)
            workManagerFactory()
        }
    }
}
```

**DSL:**
```kotlin
class StressTestApplication : Application() {
    override fun onCreate() {
        super.onCreate()
        startKoin {
            androidLogger(Level.DEBUG)
            androidContext(this@StressTestApplication)
            workManagerFactory()
            modules(appModule)
        }
    }
}
```

### Module Definitions

**Annotations — Module with provider functions:**
```kotlin
@Module
internal object DatabaseModule {
    @Singleton
    fun providesDatabase(context: Context): AppDatabase =
        Room.databaseBuilder(context, AppDatabase::class.java, "my-db").build()
}

@Module(includes = [DatabaseModule::class])
@Configuration
class DaosModule {
    @Singleton
    fun providesTopicDao(database: AppDatabase): TopicDao = database.topicDao()
}
```

**DSL — Module with create():**
```kotlin
fun database(context: Context): AppDatabase =
    Room.databaseBuilder(context, AppDatabase::class.java, "my-db").build()

fun topicDao(db: AppDatabase): TopicDao = db.topicDao()

val databaseModule = module {
    single { create(::database) }
    single { create(::topicDao) }
}
```

### Custom Qualifiers

```kotlin
@Qualifier
@Retention(AnnotationRetention.RUNTIME)
annotation class Dispatcher(val niaDispatcher: NiaDispatchers)

enum class NiaDispatchers { Default, IO }
```

**Annotations:**
```kotlin
@Module @Configuration
class DispatchersModule {
    @Singleton @Dispatcher(NiaDispatchers.IO)
    fun providesIODispatcher(): CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO
}
```

**DSL:**
```kotlin
@Dispatcher(NiaDispatchers.IO)
fun dispatcherIO(): CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO

val dispatchersModule = module {
    single { create(::dispatcherIO) }
}
```

### Interface Binding

**DSL:**
```kotlin
val dataModule = module {
    includes(databaseModule, dataStoreModule, networkModule)
    single<OfflineFirstNewsRepository>() bind NewsRepository::class
    single<OfflineFirstUserDataRepository>() bind UserDataRepository::class
}
```

**Annotations — automatic (implements interface):**
```kotlin
@Singleton
class OfflineFirstNewsRepository(
    private val newsDao: NewsResourceDao,
    private val network: NetworkDataSource,
) : NewsRepository
```

### ViewModel with Navigation Parameters

**Annotations:**
```kotlin
@KoinViewModel
class DetailViewModel(
    private val newsRepository: NewsRepository,
    @InjectedParam val newsId: String,
) : ViewModel()
```

**DSL:**
```kotlin
class DetailViewModel(
    private val newsRepository: NewsRepository,
    @InjectedParam val newsId: String = "",
) : ViewModel()

// In module:
viewModel<DetailViewModel>()
```

**Compose call site:**
```kotlin
@Composable
fun DetailScreen(newsId: String, viewModel: DetailViewModel = koinViewModel(key = newsId) { parametersOf(newsId) }) {
}
```

### Activity with Scope

```kotlin
class MainActivity : ComponentActivity(), AndroidScopeComponent {
    override val scope: Scope by activityScope()
    private val viewModel: MainActivityViewModel by viewModel()
    private val activityTracker: ActivityTracker by inject()
}
```

### App Module Composition (DSL)

```kotlin
val appModule = module {
    includes(dispatchersModule, databaseModule, dataStoreModule, networkModule, dataModule, syncModule)
    factory<GetFollowableTopicsUseCase>()
    viewModel<MainActivityViewModel>()
    viewModel<HomeViewModel>()
    viewModel<DetailViewModel>()
    activityScope {
        scoped<ActivityTracker>()
    }
}
```

### Worker

**Annotations:**
```kotlin
@KoinWorker
class SyncWorker(
    context: Context,
    params: WorkerParameters,
    private val topicsRepository: TopicsRepository,
    @Dispatcher(NiaDispatchers.IO) private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
) : CoroutineWorker(context, params)
```

**DSL:**
```kotlin
val syncModule = module {
    single<WorkManagerSyncManager>() bind SyncManager::class
    worker<SyncWorker>()
}
```

## Related Repositories

- **Koin**: https://github.com/InsertKoinIO/koin — core framework
- **Compiler Plugin**: https://github.com/InsertKoinIO/koin-compiler-plugin — compile-time safety
- **Website**: https://insert-koin.io — documentation
